name: Dossierfy
description: Dossierfy connects Claude to the Dossierfy regulatory knowledge graph, enabling AI-powered EMA variation classification under EC Regulation 1234/2008. Classifies post-authorisation changes (Type IA, IAIN, IB, II) with full condition evaluation and documentation requirements — directly inside Claude Desktop.
